PETITION TO SELL RESIDENCE OF CONSERVATEE FOR NO LESS THAN 75% OF APPRAISED VALUE, TO SELL VACANT LOT AND TO DISTRIBUTE PERSONAL INTEMS TO RELATIVES OF DECEASED DOMESTIC PARTNER OF CONSERVAEE, PETN. TO ENTER INTO EXCLUSIVE BROKERAGE LISTING, CALENDAR OF APR-28-2009 THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST TO SELL THE RESIDENCE LOCATED IN SAN FRANCISCO FOR LESS THAN 90% OF THE FAIR MARKET VALUE AND DENIED THE REQUEST TO SELL THE VACANT LOT LOCATED IN LAKE COUNTY FOR A REDUCTION OF THE SALES PRICE TO BEST OFFER RECEIVED. THE COURT APPROVED USE OF THE LINE OF CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000.00 TO REPAIR THE RESIDENCE AND PREPARE IT FOR SALE, APPROVED DISTRIBUTION OF THE TANGIBLE PERSONAL PROPERTY AND GAVE AUTHORITY TO SELECT SOMEONE FROM A REPUTABLE BROKERAGE HOUSE WITH 120 DAYS FOR EXCLUSIVE LISTING WITH A COMMISSION OF NO MORE THAN 5%.
